title: 10 Signs You're Becoming the Man Worth Marrying
caption:
Most guys are looking for the right person.

The man who's walked with God long enough knows the real question isn't "where is she" — it's "who am I becoming?"

You stopped needing her to complete you. You can be alone without being restless. You're harder on your own sin than on anyone around you. You've killed the habits she'd inherit.

The man she can trust is already doing the work. He's building something worth inviting someone into. His friends know the worst of him and still call him a man.

You want to be worth marrying more than you want to be married. That's the order. Get that right and the rest follows.

Save this. Send it to a brother who needs to hear it.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #marriage #discipleship #chasegod #christiandating
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
